use_cases: Simple numeric counter for incrementing and decrementing values
Quantity selector for product pages or shopping carts
Stepper component for form inputs requiring numeric values
Like/dislike or rating counter for content interaction
ai_summary: A minimal counter component featuring React useState for managing numeric state with increment and decrement buttons. Displays the current count value centered in a card layout with basic Tailwind styling. Acts as a foundational interactive element for any interface requiring numeric input or stepper functionality.
